label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking which of the options did NOT contribute to Nikki's reunion with her family. The options are A) her father, B) 192.com, C) her son, D) her mother-in-law. First, I need to go through the passage again to recall the details. So, Nikki was raised by her father from a very early age, and her sister by their mother. Contact stopped when she was 6. She decided to find her family after getting married and having a son. Her husband's mum recommended 192.com. With her son's help, she searched on the electoral roll for her sister's name. The site gave two results in their old area. She called the first number and it was her sister. Then her sister passed the number to their mom, who called Nikki. They met soon after. Nikki mentions that 192.com made it easy, and neither she nor her sister or mom were on social media. So, contributions: Her son helped her search on 192.com.
